case_title: ELIZEU DE OLIVEIRA VS. SOLCOM, INC.

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT SOLCOM, INC. DOING BUSINESS IN CA. AS SOLCOM COMMUNICAITON, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-14-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-14-2018 BY PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF . PLAINTIFF ELIZEU DE OLIVEIRA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SOLCOM INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY JAMES MACKINNEY, MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE: $350.00) SERVED JUN-28-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SOLCOM, INC. DOING BUSINESS IN CA. AS SOLCOM COMMUNICAITON, INC.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY DE OLIVEIRA, ELIZEU AS TO DEFENDANT SOLCOM, INC. DOING BUSINESS IN CA. AS SOLCOM COMMUNICAITON, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-14-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY DE OLIVEIRA, ELIZEU SOLCOM, INC. DOING BUSINESS IN CA. AS SOLCOM COMMUNICAITON, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-14-2018 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DE OLIVEIRA, ELIZEU IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SOLCOM, INC. DOING BUSINESS IN CA. AS SOLCOM COMMUNICAITON, INC. PLAINTIFF DID NOT ESTABLISH DEFENDANT RESPONSIBLE FOR ALLEGED DAMAGES TO PLAINTIFF'S CAR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
